narrative:
Felicity Village (precinct in Clermont County) has 333 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.0%, a clear Republican lean of 11.7 percentage points.
